tests.description: Treble energy is smoothed across consecutive frames — a spike followed by silence decays gradually rather than dropping to zero instantly
Smoothed treble value stays within 0-1 range after mapping
Treble energy influences at least one visual detail property — particles rendered with high trebleEnergy produce different fillStyle/size than with trebleEnergy=0
Treble effect is visibly distinct from bass — with only treble active particles change appearance but not macro displacement; with only bass active particles displace but don't shimmer
Scene remains readable — particle positions stay within canvas bounds even with maximum treble energy
Treble jitter does not accumulate in stored particle positions — positions after N frames with treble are bounded similarly to frames without treble

fileOperations.insertionPoint: after the privacy describe block (line 229), inside the outer describe
fileOperations.newDescribeBlock: US-019: Treble smoothing in render loop
